meta.homeTitle: Pricentrix — Price Intelligence for Ecommerce & Retail
meta.homeDescription: Visualize competitor prices, map equivalent products, and optimize your margins with real market data.
meta.blogDescription: Articles on pricing strategy, ecommerce, and competitive intelligence.
meta.documentationDescription: Complete Pricentrix documentation covering setup, catalog imports, product matching, reports, billing, and troubleshooting.
meta.contactDescription: Request a demo or get in touch to learn how Pricentrix can help your team.
meta.pricingDescription: Choose the right Pricentrix plan for your ecommerce or retail team. Start free and scale from monitoring 20 to 5,000 products.

hero.title: Analyze your competitors' prices and optimize your own
hero.description: Pricentrix helps you visualize competitor prices, map comparable products, and detect where you're too expensive, too cheap, or right where you need to be.

problem.title: Why monitoring competitor prices is no longer optional
problem.description: In ecommerce and retail, prices change constantly. Without continuous competitive monitoring, you can end up charging less than the market allows — or pricing yourself out entirely.
problem.item1: You're selling cheaper than necessary (losing margin)
problem.item3: Comparing products across competitors is hard and unclear
problem.item4: Manual price reviews don't scale as your catalog grows
problem.item5: You spot problems after they've already hurt your results

solution.title: Pricentrix turns competitive monitoring into actionable decisions
solution.p1: The platform brings together three key pieces of pricing work: seeing competitor prices, mapping equivalent products, and analyzing your market position.
solution.p2: It first captures product and price data. Then it helps you identify which competitor product matches yours. Finally, it turns that comparison into clear reports so you can decide with confidence.
solution.p3: The result: less guesswork, less manual work, and more clarity to adjust prices with a real commercial rationale.

benefits.title: Benefits that translate into business results
benefits.description: The value of Pricentrix lies in helping you find the right balance between competitiveness and profitability.
benefits.b1Desc: When you optimize margins by product, you turn pricing decisions into higher, more sustainable revenue.
benefits.b2Title: Stop losing sales to high prices
benefits.b2Desc: If you're well above the market, customers may choose a competitor before reaching your checkout or store.
benefits.b3Desc: If you're well below competitors, you may be leaving margin on the table by charging less than the market actually supports.
benefits.b4Desc: Detect relevant competitor price changes without relying on slow manual reviews.
benefits.b5Desc: Your team spends less time hunting for data and more time deciding which commercial action to take.
benefits.b6Desc: Comparing equivalent products with real context lets you act with more confidence in ecommerce and retail.

features.title: Key capabilities of Pricentrix
features.description: Each module solves a specific part of the competitive monitoring and analysis workflow.
features.f1Desc: Get continuous visibility into how your competitors are pricing their products.
features.f2Desc: Makes it easier to compare what you sell against what other players in the market offer.
features.f3Desc: Quickly see which products are priced too high, too low, or well-positioned against competitors.
features.f4Desc: View price differences by SKU or comparable product with much more clarity.
features.f5Desc: See how the market shifts over time and catch relevant price movements.
features.f6Desc: Summarize what matters so your commercial or pricing team can act faster.
features.f7Desc: Identify new references in the market early and keep your catalog competitive.
features.f8Desc: Get notified when a competitor raises or lowers prices so you can respond faster.
features.f9Desc: Within minutes you'll be monitoring prices and spotting opportunities to adjust.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: A simple flow to go from seeing competitor prices to making better-informed decisions.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Select the products you want to track in ecommerce or retail.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Get updated products and prices from your competitors.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Compare your own products with equivalent options from the market.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Identify where to charge more, where to correct, and where to hold.

cta.title: Start seeing your prices against the market with more clarity
cta.description: For ecommerce and retail teams who need to decide smarter, react faster, and protect margin without losing competitiveness.

footer.tagline: Price intelligence for ecommerce and retail teams who want to compete with more clarity, speed, and better decisions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p1: Pricentrix ("we", "our", "us") provides a SaaS platform that helps businesses monitor competitor prices, map products, and analyze pricing data.
privacy.s1p2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our platform.
privacy.s21intro: When you create an account, we may collect:
privacy.s22p1: As part of using Pricentrix, you may provide:
s22items: Your product catalog (names, prices, URLs, metadata)
privacy.s22p2: This data is processed to enable price comparison and reporting features.
privacy.s24p1: When you use scraping or URL import features, we collect:
s24items: Publicly available product data from competitor websites
Product pricing and metadata from submitted URLs
privacy.s24p2: This data is collected only based on user-initiated actions.
s3items: Provide core platform functionality (catalog import, matching, reporting)
Process jobs such as imports and scraping
Ensure platform security and prevent abuse
s4items: You retain full ownership of your own product and business data.
Pricentrix does not claim ownership over your uploaded or generated data.
We act as a data processor on your behalf.
privacy.s5p1: We do not sell your data.
privacy.s5intro: We may share data only in these cases:
s5items: When required by law or legal process
To protect rights, security, or prevent fraud
privacy.s6intro: Pricentrix operates as a multi-tenant system:
s6items: Each account's data is logically isolated
We implement safeguards to prevent cross-account access
Internal systems enforce account-level data separation
s7items: As required for legal or compliance purposes
privacy.s7p1: You may request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.s8intro: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures, including:
privacy.s9intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may:
privacy.s10p1: You can control cookies via browser settings.
privacy.s11p1: Pricentrix relies on the following third-party providers to operate the platform:
privacy.s12p1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.
privacy.s10p2: We use cookie-script.com for cookie consent management and privacy regulation compliance.
privacy.s10p3: You can control cookies via browser settings or through the consent banner.
s11providers: Amazon Web Services (AWS) — EC2 and S3 in the us-west-2 region (Oregon, USA) for compute and storage infrastructure.
Vercel — Deployment and delivery of the public website (pricentrix.com).
cookie-script.com — Cookie consent management and privacy regulation compliance.
privacy.s11p2: Each provider processes data under their own privacy policies. We recommend reviewing them if you have questions about how these services handle your data.

terms.s1p2: If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
terms.s2intro: Pricentrix is a SaaS platform that allows users to:
s3items: Be responsible for all activity under your account
s4items: Use the platform for illegal purposes
Attempt to access other users' data
Interfere with system integrity or performance
s51items: You are responsible for all data you upload
You must have rights to use submitted data (e.g., URLs)
s52items: Pricentrix processes publicly available data from URLs you provide
You are responsible for complying with applicable laws and website terms
terms.s6p1: Pricentrix provides tools to collect publicly available data.
s6items: You are responsible for how you use these tools
You must comply with applicable laws and website terms
Pricentrix is not responsible for misuse of scraping features
terms.s7p1: We aim to provide reliable service but do not guarantee:
s7items: Immediate job processing (imports, scraping may take time)
s8items: Services may be offered under subscription plans
Limits (e.g., products, competitors) depend on your plan
Fees are non-refundable unless stated otherwise
terms.s9p1: All platform components (software, UI, branding) are owned by Pricentrix.
s9items: Copy, modify, or distribute the platform
terms.s10intro: We may suspend or terminate accounts if:
terms.s10p1: You may terminate your account at any time.
terms.s11intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law:
s11items: Pricentrix is not liable for indirect or consequential damages
We are not responsible for business decisions made based on platform data
terms.s12p1: The platform provides informational pricing insights only.
terms.s13p1: We may update these Terms. Continued use implies acceptance.
terms.s14p1: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of Mexico.
terms.s7p2: The platform is hosted on Amazon Web Services (EC2 and S3, us-west-2 region). The public website runs on Vercel. Service availability may be affected by outages at these infrastructure providers.
